docs.title: Introdution
docs.text: We continue to contribute public goods to help the Ethereum and Optimism community get better and better.

docs.title: Our Works
docs.text:
We have currently developed two important components of Optimism:

Hildr is an optimism rollup client written in Java.

Op-Besu is an optimism execution client written in Java, a fork of Besu.

docs.title: Our Vision
docs.text: We hope that through our efforts, Ethereum and the Optimism chain will become more accessible and user-friendly, promoting the widespread adoption of blockchain technology.

docs.title: Contract Us
docs.text: If you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to contact us on github. We look forward to working with you to advance blockchain technology!

docs.title: Hildr
docs.text:
Hildr is an OP Stack rollup client written in Java 21. And follow the spec:

Magi

Op-node

docs.title: Use docker
docs.text: You can use Docker to run Hildr as an Optimism CL node.

docs.title: Pull docker image
docs.text: docker pull ghcr.io/optimism-java/hildr:latest

docs.title: Start a Hildr node
docs.text:
op sepoliadevnet or other 
docker run -it -p 11545:11545 \
-v <you jwt secret>:/jwt/jwt.hex \
ghcr.io/optimism-java/op-besu:latest -- \
--network optimism-sepolia \ # can be either: "optimism","base","base-sepolia"
--jwt-file /jwt/jwt.hex \
--l1-rpc-url http://localhost:9545 \
--l1-ws-rpc-url ws://localhost:9546 \
--l1-beacon-url http://localhost:4000 \
--l2-rpc-url http://localhost:8545 \
--l2-engine-url http://localhost:8551 \
--rpc-port 11545 \
--log-level INFO \ # can be either: "DEBUG","TRACE","WARN","ERROR"
--sync-mode full

docker run -it -p 11545:11545 \
-v <your jwt secret>:/jwt/jwt.hex \
-v <your rollup.json file>:/network-configs/rollup.json
ghcr.io/optimism-java/op-besu:latest -- \
--devnet \
--network=/network-configs/rollup.json \
--jwt-file /jwt/jwt.hex \
--l1-rpc-url http://localhost:9545 \
--l1-ws-rpc-url ws://localhost:9546 \
--l1-beacon-url http://localhost:4000 \
--l2-rpc-url http://localhost:8545 \
--l2-engine-url http://localhost:8551 \
--rpc-port 11545 \
--log-level INFO \ # can be either: "DEBUG","TRACE","WARN","ERROR"
--sync-mode full

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Java JDK 21+

docs.title: Download the Hildr jar
docs.text: Download the Hildr jar.

docs.title: Start a Hildr node
docs.text:
op sepoliadevnet or other 
java --enable-preview \
-cp <the Hildr jar file> io.optimism.Hildr \
--network optimism-sepolia \
--jwt-secret ./jwt.hex \
--l1-rpc-url http://localhost:9545 \
--l1-ws-rpc-url ws://localhost:9546 \
--l1-beacon-url http://localhost:4000 \
--l2-rpc-url http://localhost:8545 \
--l2-engine-url http://localhost:8551 \
--rpc-port 11545 \
--log-level INFO \ # can be either: "DEBUG","TRACE","WARN","ERROR"
--sync-mode full >l2-hildr-node.log 2>&1 &

java --enable-preview \
-cp <the Hildr jar file> io.optimism.Hildr \
--devnet \
--network <rollup.json file> \
--jwt-secret ./jwt.hex \
--l1-rpc-url http://localhost:9545 \
--l1-ws-rpc-url ws://localhost:9546 \
--l1-beacon-url http://localhost:4000 \
--l2-rpc-url http://localhost:8545 \
--l2-engine-url http://localhost:8551 \
--rpc-port 11545 \
--log-level INFO \ # can be either: "DEBUG","TRACE","WARN","ERROR"
--sync-mode full >l2-hildr-node.log 2>&1 &

docs.title: Op-Besu
docs.text: Op-Besu is a fork of Besu that supports the execution engine of OP stack.

docs.title: Use the packaged binaries
docs.text: You can install the Op-besu or Op-geth client to run a Optimism EL node from a binary distribution.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Java JDK 21+

docs.title: Install from packaged binaries
docs.text:
Download the Op Besu packaged binaires.

Unpack the downloaded files and change into the op-besu-<release> directory.

docs.title: Run a Op-Besu node
docs.text:
op sepoliadevnet or other 
cd op-besu-<release> && \
./bin/besu \
--network=OP_SEPOLIA \
--p2p-enabled=false \
--discovery-enabled=false \
--data-path=<your data dir> \
--engine-rpc-enabled \
--engine-jwt-secret=<jwt secret file> \
--rpc-http-enabled \
--host-allowlist=* \
--engine-host-allowlist=* \
--logging=INFO \
--version-compatibility-protection=false

cd op-besu-<release> && \
./bin/besu \
--genesis-file=<devnet genesis file> \
--p2p-enabled=false \
--discovery-enabled=false \
--data-path=<your data dir> \
--engine-rpc-enabled \
--engine-jwt-secret=<jwt secret file> \
--rpc-http-enabled \
--host-allowlist=* \
--engine-host-allowlist=* \
--logging=INFO \
--version-compatibility-protection=false

docs.title: Use docker
docs.text: You can use Docker to run Op-Besu or Op-Geth as a Optimism EL node on the testnets.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Download and install Docker.

docs.title: Pull docker image
docs.text: docker pull docker pull ghcr.io/optimism-java/op-besu:latest

docs.title: Start a Op-Besu node
docs.text:
op sepoliadevnet or other 
docker run -it -p 8545:8545 -p 8551:8551 -v <you jwt secret>:/jwt/jwtsecret \
ghcr.io/optimism-java/op-besu:latest -- \
--network=OP_SEPOLIA \
--p2p-enabled=false \
--discovery-enabled=false \
--data-path="/data/" \
--engine-rpc-enabled \
--engine-jwt-secret="/jwt/jwtsecret" \
--rpc-http-enabled \
--host-allowlist="*" \
--engine-host-allowlist="*" \
--logging=INFO \
--version-compatibility-protection=false

docker run -it -p 8545:8545 -p 8551:8551 -v <you jwt secret>:/jwt/jwtsecret \
ghcr.io/optimism-java/op-besu:latest -- \
--genesis-file=<devnet genesis file> \
--p2p-enabled=false \
--discovery-enabled=false \
--data-path="/data/" \
--engine-rpc-enabled \
--engine-jwt-secret="/jwt/jwtsecret" \
--rpc-http-enabled \
--host-allowlist="*" \
--engine-host-allowlist="*" \
--logging=INFO \
--version-compatibility-protection=false
